raw: {"questions":[{"label":"What’s on your mind","name":"What’s been most on your mind at work lately, Nina?","description":"Safe opener that lets Nina set context before any concern is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Late nights now","name":"What is driving the late nights now that the sprint pressure has eased?","description":"Separates a temporary push from a longer-running load and surfaces the real cause of the current pace.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Load you can keep","name":"Does this pace feel sustainable for the next few weeks?","description":"Checks whether the current workload is still a sprint or has become the default.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Recognition landing","name":"How have the recent wins landed for you?","description":"Surfaces whether her execution is being seen in a way that actually matters to her.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visibility gap","name":"Where do you feel least visible in the work right now?","description":"Finds the part of her influence or ownership that is getting lost despite strong delivery.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Influence points","name":"What would make your influence easier to feel in the team?","description":"Gets at what practical change would improve her ability to shape decisions and outcomes.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Priority tradeoff","name":"What are you choosing not to do right now?","description":"Forces the real tradeoff behind her current focus and whether the load is being consciously managed.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What support from me would actually help this fortnight?","description":"Makes the ask concrete so she can name the kind of manager support that would change the week.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision rights","name":"Where do you need a faster call from me?","description":"Surfaces places where delay or ambiguity is slowing her down and where manager action would help.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?","description":"Closes by turning the discussion into a practical plan for a calmer, clearer stretch ahead.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
